## Summary

Briefly describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Related issue

Fixes #(issue number) or references #(issue number).

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally.
- [ ] `npm run test` passes locally (or new tests are added for the change).
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes locally.
- [ ] Code follows the existing TypeScript conventions in the project.
- [ ] No new external API keys, servers, or telemetry are introduced.
- [ ] The change respects the project's non-goals: delete-only editing,
      browser-only processing, WebM/VP9/Opus export, and English-only
      transcription at this release.
- [ ] Documentation (README, CHANGELOG, or inline comments) is updated if
      the change affects user-facing behavior.

## Testing

Describe how you tested the change, including browser/OS versions and any
sample media used.
